options.blogdescription: Exploring the HTML Sitemap block and shortcode

'; } function hs_sc( $s ) { return '' . $s . ''; } function hs_page( $title, $content, $parent = 0, $order = 0, $slug = '' ) { $args = array( 'post_title' => $title, 'post_content' => $content, 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_parent' => $parent, 'menu_order' => $order, ); if ( $slug ) { $args['post_name'] = $slug; } return wp_insert_post( $args ); } // ── Top-level pages ────────────────────────────────────────── $about = hs_page( 'About Us', hs_p( 'Learn about our company, team, and mission.' ), 0, 10 ); $services = hs_page( 'Services', hs_p( 'Explore our professional services.' ), 0, 20 ); $products = hs_page( 'Products', hs_p( 'Browse our product offerings.' ), 0, 30 ); $resources = hs_page( 'Resources', hs_p( 'Find guides, documentation, and support.' ), 0, 40 ); hs_page( 'Contact Us', hs_p( 'Get in touch with our team.' ), 0, 50 ); hs_page( 'Privacy Policy', hs_p( 'Our privacy policy and data handling practices.' ), 0, 60 ); hs_page( 'Terms of Use', hs_p( 'Terms and conditions for using our services.' ), 0, 70 ); // ── About children ─────────────────────────────────────────── hs_page( 'Our Team', hs_p( 'Meet the people behind our company.' ), $about, 1 ); hs_page( 'Our Mission', hs_p( 'Our vision, purpose, and core values.' ), $about, 2 ); hs_page( 'Company History', hs_p( 'Our story over the years.' ), $about, 3 ); // ── Services children ──────────────────────────────────────── hs_page( 'Web Design', hs_p( 'Custom web design and development solutions.' ), $services, 1 ); hs_page( 'SEO Services', hs_p( 'Get found online with our SEO expertise.' ), $services, 2 ); hs_page( 'Consulting', hs_p( 'Strategic digital guidance for your business.' ), $services, 3 ); // ── Products children ──────────────────────────────────────── hs_page( 'Product Catalog', hs_p( 'Browse our full product line.' ), $products, 1 ); hs_page( 'Pricing Plans', hs_p( 'Flexible pricing for every budget.' ), $products, 2 ); hs_page( 'Compare', hs_p( 'Side-by-side comparison of our products.' ), $products, 3 ); // ── Resources children ─────────────────────────────────────── hs_page( 'Getting Started', hs_p( 'Everything you need to get up and running.' ), $resources, 1 ); hs_page( 'Documentation', hs_p( 'Comprehensive technical documentation.' ), $resources, 2 ); hs_page( 'FAQ', hs_p( 'Answers to frequently asked questions.' ), $resources, 3 ); hs_page( 'Support', hs_p( 'Get help from our support team.' ), $resources, 4 ); // ── Block Demo Page ─────────────────────────────────────────── $bd = hs_h( 'HTML Sitemap Block — Feature Showcase' ) . hs_p( 'Each block below uses different settings to showcase the flexibility of the HTML Sitemap plugin. Add the block to any page via the block inserter (Widgets → HTML Sitemap).' ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '1. Default — All Pages, All Levels', 3 ) . hs_p( 'Block with no configuration: displays the full page hierarchy.' ) . hs_make_block() . hs_hr() . hs_h( '2. Top-Level Pages Only (depth=1)', 3 ) . hs_p( 'Shows only the top-level parent pages, no children.' ) . hs_make_block( array( 'depth' => '1' ) ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '3. Two Levels Deep (depth=2)', 3 ) . hs_p( 'Shows pages up to two levels of nesting.' ) . hs_make_block( array( 'depth' => '2' ) ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '4. Numbered List — Top Level (ordered_list_type=1)', 3 ) . hs_p( 'Ordered list using numbers, top-level pages only.' ) . hs_make_block( array( 'depth' => '1', 'ordered_list_type' => '1' ) ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '5. Alphabetic Ordered List, 2 Levels (ordered_list_type=a)', 3 ) . hs_p( 'Ordered list using lowercase letters, two levels deep.' ) . hs_make_block( array( 'depth' => '2', 'ordered_list_type' => 'a' ) ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '6. Roman Numeral List — Top Level (ordered_list_type=I)', 3 ) . hs_p( 'Ordered list using uppercase roman numerals.' ) . hs_make_block( array( 'depth' => '1', 'ordered_list_type' => 'I' ) ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '7. Sorted A-Z with Published Date (show_date=true)', 3 ) . hs_p( 'All pages in alphabetical order, published date shown beside each entry.' ) . hs_make_block( array( 'sort_column' => 'post_title', 'sort_order' => 'ASC', 'show_date' => 'true' ) ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '8. Most Recently Modified with Modified Date (show_date=modified)', 3 ) . hs_p( 'Pages ordered by last modified date, newest first, with the modification date shown.' ) . hs_make_block( array( 'sort_column' => 'post_modified', 'sort_order' => 'DESC', 'show_date' => 'modified' ) ); hs_page( 'HTML Sitemap — Block Demo', $bd, 0, 80, 'sitemap-block-demo' ); // ── Shortcode Demo Page ─────────────────────────────────────── $sd = hs_h( 'HTML Sitemap Shortcode — Feature Showcase' ) . hs_p( 'Each section below demonstrates a different [html_sitemap] shortcode configuration using the classic Shortcode block.' ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '1. Default Sitemap', 3 ) . hs_p( '[html_sitemap] — full site hierarchy, no parameters.' ) . hs_sc( '[html_sitemap]' ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '2. Top-Level Pages Only (depth=1)', 3 ) . hs_p( '[html_sitemap depth=' . $dq . '1' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_sc( '[html_sitemap depth=' . $dq . '1' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '3. Two Levels Deep (depth=2)', 3 ) . hs_p( '[html_sitemap depth=' . $dq . '2' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_sc( '[html_sitemap depth=' . $dq . '2' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '4. Numbered Ordered List (ordered_list_type=1)', 3 ) . hs_p( '[html_sitemap ordered_list_type=' . $dq . '1' . $dq . ' depth=' . $dq . '1' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_sc( '[html_sitemap ordered_list_type=' . $dq . '1' . $dq . ' depth=' . $dq . '1' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '5. Alphabetic Ordered List (ordered_list_type=a)', 3 ) . hs_p( '[html_sitemap ordered_list_type=' . $dq . 'a' . $dq . ' depth=' . $dq . '2' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_sc( '[html_sitemap ordered_list_type=' . $dq . 'a' . $dq . ' depth=' . $dq . '2' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '6. Roman Numeral List (ordered_list_type=I)', 3 ) . hs_p( '[html_sitemap ordered_list_type=' . $dq . 'I' . $dq . ' depth=' . $dq . '1' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_sc( '[html_sitemap ordered_list_type=' . $dq . 'I' . $dq . ' depth=' . $dq . '1' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '7. With Published Dates, Sorted A-Z', 3 ) . hs_p( '[html_sitemap show_date=' . $dq . 'true' . $dq . ' sort_column=' . $dq . 'post_title' . $dq . ' sort_order=' . $dq . 'ASC' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_sc( '[html_sitemap show_date=' . $dq . 'true' . $dq . ' sort_column=' . $dq . 'post_title' . $dq . ' sort_order=' . $dq . 'ASC' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_hr() . hs_h( '8. Modified Date, Newest First', 3 ) . hs_p( '[html_sitemap show_date=' . $dq . 'modified' . $dq . ' sort_column=' . $dq . 'post_modified' . $dq . ' sort_order=' . $dq . 'DESC' . $dq . ']' ) . hs_sc( '[html_sitemap show_date=' . $dq . 'modified' . $dq . ' sort_column=' . $dq . 'post_modified' . $dq . ' sort_order=' . $dq . 'DESC' . $dq . ']' ); hs_page( 'HTML Sitemap — Shortcode Demo', $sd, 0, 90, 'sitemap-shortcode-demo' ); flush_rewrite_rules();
